---
title: "" 
toc: false 
format:
  html: 
    sidebar-width: 300px
    body-width: 900px
    margin-width: 300px
    gutter-width: 1.5rem
from: markdown+emoji

listing: 
  contents:
    - "blog/2023-10-31-short-post-description/index.qmd"
  type: grid 
  sort: false 
  categories: false 
  feed: false
---

::: grid
::: g-col-4
![](media/foto4.png)
:::

::: g-col-8
\
\
\
[Hi, I'm Thomas :grin:]{.orange-h1-thicc}\
[welcome to my site!]{.orange-h2-thicc}\
\
I'm a social science student at [Justus-Liebig-University Gießen](https://www.uni-giessen.de/de/fbz/fb03) and I like learning new things in R and statistics. \
\
[:link:[About me](./about.qmd)]{.link-text}
:::
:::

---

<div class="center-text orange-h1-weighted"> Navigation </div>

<div class="grid button-container">
  <div class="g-col-3 right-text  text-scp">[ [Blog](./blog.qmd) ]{.button}</div>
  
  <div class="g-col-3 center-text text-scp">[ [Astrophotos](./astro.qmd)]{.button}</div>
  
  <div class="g-col-3 center-text text-scp">[ [Streetphotos](./street.qmd) ]{.button}</div>
  
  <div class="g-col-3 left-text   text-scp">[ [About](./about.qmd) ]{.button}</div>
  
</div>
\
---
<link href="https://social.example.com/@username" rel="me">

<div class="center-text orange-h1-weighted"> Highlighted Projects </div>
